title: Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Full Stack Developer at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates:
Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates!
